name: Twinned Spell
description:
When you cast a spell that targets only one creature and doesn't have a range of self, you can spend a number of sorcery points equal to the spell's level to target a second creature in range with the same spell (1 sorcery point if the spell is a cantrip).

To be eligible, a spell must be incapable of targeting more than one creature at the spell's current level. For example, [_magic missile_](#magic-missile) and [_scorching ray_](#scorching-ray) aren't eligible, but [_ray of frost_](#ray-of-frost) and [_finger of death_](#finger-of-death) are.
